# Omuz Serisi — Derleme (2026-04-12)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Effects of scapular-focused movement-based exercises on sports performance of athletes with scapular dyskinesis: A systematic review.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effects of scapular-focused movement-based egzersizs on sports performance of athletes with scapular dyskinesis: a sistematik derleme. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: plos one. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: scapular, effects, focused, movement, based, egzersizs.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41961840/

### Efficacy of Corticosteroid Injection in Shoulder Pain in Indian Population: A Randomized Control Trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik efficacy of corticosteroid injection in omuz ağrı in indian population: a randomize control klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: annals of african medicine. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: efficacy, corticosteroid, injection, omuz, ağrı, indian.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41957997/

### Role of Electro-Therapeutic Modalities in Breast Cancer-Related Lymphedema and Shoulder Dysfunction: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik role of electro-therapeutic modalities in breast cancer-related lymphedema and omuz dysfonksiyon: a sistematik derleme and meta-analiz. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: indian journal of palliative care. 2026 jan-mar. Anahtar kavramlar: role, electro, therapeutic, modalities, breast, cancer.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41953826/

### Impact of Myofascial Release Therapy Combined with Isokinetic Training on pain, function, and radiological outcomes in collegiate basketball players with subacromial impingement syndrome: a prospective randomized controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik impact of myofascial release therapy combined with isokinetic training on ağrı, fonksiyon, and radiological sonuçs in collegiate basketball players with subacromial sıkışma (impingement) syndrome: a prospective randomize controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc sports science, medicine & rehabilitasyon. 2026 apr 7. Anahtar kavramlar: impact, myofascial, release, therapy, combined, isokinetic.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41947262/

### Navigating rare terrain: successful management of subscapular and deltoid hematomas via the dorsal scapular approach.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik navigating rare terrain: successful management of subscapular and deltoid hematomas via the dorsal scapular approach. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of surgical case reports. 2026 apr. Anahtar kavramlar: navigating, rare, terrain, successful, management, subscapular.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41939229/

### The clinical impact of high intensity laser therapy on post stroke shoulder pain and dysfunction associated with hemiplegia: a systematic review.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the clinical impact of high intensity laser therapy on post inme omuz ağrı and dysfonksiyon associated with hemiplegia: a sistematik derleme. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: neurological sciences : official journal of the italian neurological society and of the italian society of clinical neurophysiology. 2026 apr 6. Anahtar kavramlar: clinical, neurological, italian, society, impact, high.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41936741/
